subject: 英语
source: 英语练习软件家长页导出（家长投喂）
note: 弟弟英语学习档案主线。后续每次导出追加一个 session，并据此刷新 profile_eddey 英语知识点。

sessions.topic: 房间 + 好玩的活动（rooms + fun activities）

wrong_items.q: 有很多好玩的事可以做。
wrong_items.user: There are lots to fun of things do
wrong_items.correct: There are lots of fun things to do.

wrong_items.user: I like in the swimming pool
wrong_items.correct: I like swimming in the pool.

wrong_items.q: I ___ English classes every week.（我每周上英语课）
There is a balcony on the second floor.
The balcony is on the first floor.

sessions.teacher_note: 主题：房间+好玩活动。重点薄弱：名词复数 s、地道用词(take classes / certified in skills)、发音(rooms 40% / bathroom 46%)。建议每天 8-10 分钟，外教课前再做 5 分钟冲刺。
